NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into as of the 1st day of January, 2023, by and between Dr. John Tan, NRIC No. S7654321B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore, and CosmoTech Innovations Pte Ltd, UEN: T12LL3456K, with a principal office at 456 Jurong Gateway, Singapore. Contact details for CosmoTech are +65 6123 4567 and info@cosmotech.sg.

1. CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. For the purposes of this Agreement, "Confidential Information" shall mean any and all information disclosed by either party to the other, either directly or indirectly, in writing, orally, or by inspection of tangible objects, that is designated as "Confidential" or "Proprietary." Confidential Information may include, but is not limited to, business plans, project status updates, and financial data. Confidential Information does not include information that is publicly known or becomes publicly known through no breach of this Agreement by the receiving party.

2. OBLIGATIONS OF RECEIVING PARTY. The receiving party agrees to: (a) maintain the confidentiality of the Confidential Information using the same degree of care that it uses to protect its own confidential information, but in no event less than a reasonable degree of care; (b) not disclose any Confidential Information to third parties without the prior written consent of the disclosing party; and (c) not use any Confidential Information for any purpose outside the scope of this Agreement. This obligation shall survive for a period of three (3) years from the date of termination of this Agreement.

For verification purposes, please visit https://secureportal.sg/access/?id=S7654321B. The parties acknowledge that this Agreement does not constitute a project plan or a project status document. 

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
